cards.text:
Evening Games
In the evenings, we engage in ball games beside the creek.

Location
Our playing field is located in our neighbor's field.

Running Exhilaration
We run with such speed that catching our breath becomes difficult.

Nightfall Indicators
1. The transition from blue dark to black sky signals the onset of night.
2. The coldness of the grass becomes noticeable.
3. The trees appear to creep closer.

Game Conclusion
As night settles, the game naturally comes to an end.

Night's Victory
The triumph of night marks the conclusion of the day's activities.

Friendship and Unity
  • A shared field brings people together.
  • Games enhance bonds and create cherished memories.

Connection with Nature
Playing next to the creek offers a direct link to the natural world.

Sense Awakening
  • The coolness of the grass underfoot especially stimulating at dusk.
  • Observing the gradual change in the evening sky can be mesmerizing.

Rhythm of the Day
The setting sun marks the closure of daylight activities.
